full_text:
Huang Zhu 黃柱
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Zhu (黃柱)was born in Nanyang. Employed at Guiyang. Chen Shou recorded that most other information had been lost. Huang Zhu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
